description:
Bot for Kling Omni Image-to-Video inference. Send one image for image-to-video generation and two images for first-to-last frame video generation. 

Optional parameters:
Set Duration. Select from (5 seconds, 10 seconds) to specify video length in seconds. Set to 5 seconds as default.

Notes:
Accepted file type: jpeg, png, webp, heic, heif. 
This bot does not accept video files.
Prompt is required after attaching images to generate video.
